commands: set -x; echo STEP1_DISK; df -h /; echo STEP2_S3; aws s3 ls s3://hypermage-vr-unreal-build-artifacts-dev/builds/latest/HyperMageVRServer.zip --region eu-west-1; echo STEP3_DOWNLOAD; aws s3 cp s3://hypermage-vr-unreal-build-artifacts-dev/builds/latest/HyperMageVRServer.zip /build/existing.zip --region eu-west-1 2>&1 | tail -3; echo DOWNLOAD_EXIT:$?; echo STEP4_UNZIP; mkdir -p /build/existing; unzip -q /build/existing.zip -d /build/existing; echo UNZIP_EXIT:$?; echo STEP5_CHECK; ls /build/existing/ | head -5; echo DONE
